message:
fix(codegen): Phase 2B numeric test compile fixes

- Fix int(str, base) to use UnifiedInt instead of i64 cast for large integers
- Fix string type to always use []const u8 (strRepeat returns const)
- Fix BigInt vs UnifiedInt type tracking for int(string_var) assignments
- Add CPUStopwatch and adjust_int_max_str_digits stubs to test.support

Reduces test_int compile errors from 19+ to 11.
